title: Gnosis Indus Atlas
description: Anchor application and evidence repository for the Indus-Valley lane of the Zer0pa Gnosis Portfolio. Packages a clean-room search-without-decode runtime, Phase 4 conditional morphological catalogue (k=70, with stability caveat), Phase 5 non-decipherment falsification posture, and the paper verdict stack. No decipherment of the Indus script is claimed or intended.
notes: Phase 4 conditional catalogue (k=70) and Phase 5 non-decipherment posture are the authority evidence surfaces. Image rights and full catalogue redistribution are not yet cleared (BLOCKED_RIGHTS in DATA_POLICY.md). The bundled fixture is small and authority-anchored.
